nodes.arrangement: Root page contains header, main content, state message group, and overlay host.
nodes.sizing: Fills available carrier width with readable max width on desktop.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Page owns vertical scroll for height overflow.
nodes.width_behavior: Children wrap or stack inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Header sits above the main field content.
nodes.sizing: Full parent width with compact height.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps title and status inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Desktop row, tablet and mobile vertical stack inside parent.
nodes.sizing: Consumes remaining width and height while preserving readable minimums.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps inside parent width and stacks before overflow.

nodes.arrangement: Fields appear in task order with page type select after audience.
nodes.sizing: Fields fill available group width with minimum touch and text targets.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps labels and stacks controls inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Save draft, Validate brief, and Generate DRD appear after fields.
nodes.scroll_behavior: May become sticky within parent without contradiction on constrained height.
nodes.width_behavior: Actions wrap or stack before clipping.

nodes.arrangement: Disabled, save, and inline recovery messages appear near the controls they explain.
nodes.sizing: Message area grows with copy while keeping actions reachable.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps message copy inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Overlay panel contains processing, failure, recovery, and final-ready states.
nodes.sizing: Panel fits within carrier safe area and scrolls internally when needed.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Overlay body scrolls without contradiction while actions remain reachable.
nodes.width_behavior: Panel wraps copy and controls inside carrier width.
nodes.entry_context: Opened by brief.validate, brief.generate, or overlay.retry from the same Brief Intake task.
nodes.return_placement: Returns focus to the triggering action or editable brief fields after close or edit brief.
